title: Section — RFI Log
description: Request-for-Information register. During bid/estimating these are pre-bid questions and scope clarifications; at start-up they seed the project RFI log. Captures the question, the spec/drawing reference, ball-in-court, and any stated cost/schedule impact — verbatim. Resolving an RFI or assessing its impact is downstream work; this section structures the log.

rfi_id.description: RFI number as logged, or assigned id, e.g. 'RFI-007'.

answer.description: The response, verbatim, when present (e.g. answered in an addendum).

spec_drawing_ref.description: Spec section / drawing sheet the RFI references.

cost_impact_noted.description: Cost impact as stated in the document, verbatim. Not assessed here.
